function.description: Behavioral coverage for edge detection, sticky, overflow, and interrupt behavior.

cycle.description: Cycle/handshake/latency/FSM coverage for synchronizer delay, edge decode timing, and APB protocol.

coverage_goals.functional: Legacy alias: function + cycle coverage must both close; new flows read coverage_goals.function and coverage_goals.cycle separately.
